test.create_query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_nullable_order_by (x UInt32, y UInt32) ENGINE=MergeTree ORDER BY x
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_nullable_order_by SELECT number, number FROM numbers(30000000)
test.query: SELECT y FROM test_nullable_order_by ORDER BY x::UInt64 LIMIT 100000 FORMAT Null
SELECT y FROM test_nullable_order_by ORDER BY x::Nullable(UInt64) LIMIT 100000 FORMAT Null
